series_metadata.series_description: A) Provides reference and evidence of deposits of currency and negotiable instruments with the State Treasurer. B) The file contains a receipted copy of ADM-3149 showing source of receipts, appropriation codes, revenues, refunds and total amount of deposit to the State Treasurer.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 6 fiscal years after the close of the fiscal year in which remittance was made and then destroy, providing audit by State Auditor is completed. If scanned and saved in an electronic format, the paper copy may be destroyed at that time. ; Electronic: Retain 6 fiscal years after the close of the fiscal year in which remittance was made and then destroy, providing audit by State Auditor is completed., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
